narrative_beat: Wide globo-bola em chamas com rachaduras dourado-vermelhas, cinzas ao redor

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: the same medieval leather globe-ball from Q26, now engulfed in flames with golden-red cracks propagating across its surface like tectonic fractures, surrounded by falling ash
subject.focal_point: the widest crack at center of the globe emitting molten golden light
subject.secondary: Empty bleachers in monochrome behind. Ash falling everywhere.

environment.time_of_day: night with fire as sole illumination

composition.foreground: burning globe in vivid crimson, gold and amber flames

lighting.key_light: fire glow from burning globe as primary light

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: the world-toy is breaking — consequences of being kicked
symbolism.secondary: cracks as fault lines of civilization

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
